title: Create Project type and static projects data
description: Define Project interface and static projects list. Place in lib/content or similar.
acceptanceCriteria: Project interface: id, title, href, optional description
At least one placeholder project for development

steps.details: Create lib/src/content/projects.ts. Export interface Project { id: string; title: string; href: string; description?: string }.
Export const projects: Project[] = [{ id: '1', title: 'Placeholder', href: '#', description: 'Sample' }]. Add 1-2 more placeholders for Alex Russell.

technicalNotes: Content can later move to MD/MDX if needed
